title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading above 158.00, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: Geopolitical Risk
text: IRGC warns to stop all imports and exports in the Gulf of Oman if US continues blockade, driving crude bid and supporting commodity bloc (AUD, CAD, NOK); monitor for supply-shock escalation.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% long, a multi-year extreme; watch for potential long squeeze, especially if ECB guidance surprises.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 18.2 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.18%.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding above 0.7137, supported by RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported.
